SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.service

Class IctaxImportService

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.service.IctaxImportService
@Service public class IctaxImportService extends Object
Service for importing ICTax Kursliste XML data from uploaded zip files. Handles file storage, XML parsing, and database persistence of Swiss tax data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    IctaxImportService()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteUpload(int idTaxUpload)
    Deletes an upload including its stored file and all associated tax data (cascaded via DB).
    TaxUpload
    reimport(int idTaxUpload)
    Re-imports an existing upload file with the current set of ISINs from GT's security table.
    List<TaxUpload>
    uploadAndImport(int idTaxYear, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile[] files)
    Uploads and processes one or more zip files for a given tax year.

    • IctaxImportService

      public IctaxImportService()

  • Method Details

    • uploadAndImport

      @Transactional public List<TaxUpload> uploadAndImport(int idTaxYear, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile[] files) throws IOException
      Uploads and processes one or more zip files for a given tax year.
      Parameters:
      idTaxYear - the tax year to associate uploads with
      files - uploaded zip files containing XML + .ix data
      Returns:
      list of created TaxUpload records
      Throws:
      IOException

    • reimport

      @Transactional public TaxUpload reimport(int idTaxUpload) throws IOException
      Re-imports an existing upload file with the current set of ISINs from GT's security table.
      Parameters:
      idTaxUpload - the upload to re-import
      Returns:
      updated TaxUpload with new record count
      Throws:
      IOException

    • deleteUpload

      @Transactional public void deleteUpload(int idTaxUpload) throws IOException
      Deletes an upload including its stored file and all associated tax data (cascaded via DB).
      Parameters:
      idTaxUpload - the upload to delete
      Throws:
      IOException
